Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-25680 affecting package docker-compose for versions less than 2.27.0-13
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-25680 affecting package docker-compose for versions less than 2.27.0-13. A patched version of the package is available.

Criterion.Comment: Package docker-compose is earlier than 2.27.0-13, affected by CVE-2026-25680
